category_sources: source_facts.description identifies recc as the Remote Execution Caching Compiler; official BuildBox documentation describes recc as a compiler command launcher for caching and remote execution.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is recc; official BuildBox documentation page is titled recc.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage redirects to the official BuildBox recc documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is from gitlab.com/BuildGrid/buildbox/buildbox, and official recc documentation is under BuildBox.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Remote Execution Caching Compiler; official docs say recc handles C/C++ compilation commands for caching and remote execution.
